title: No Singleplayer
description: This mod adds a simple but useful feature to Minecraft: it disables the Singleplayer option on the client side.
body:
为游戏添加了一个功能：禁用客户端的单人游戏模式
这个模组为我自己制作，或许有其他人也需要它。
你可以使用它在任何整合包中，无需告知作者。
# 语言支持：中文、繁体中文、俄语、日语、英语

This mod adds a simple but useful feature to Minecraft: it disables the Singleplayer option on the client side. 
Originally created for my own use, I hope it might also be helpful to others. 
You’re free to include this mod in any modpack without needing to notify or credit the author. 
# Supported languages: Chinese (Simplified), Chinese (Traditional), Russian, Japanese, and English.
